headline: Session 42 made the audit and genius-list protocol surfaces executable and truthful instead of workaround-driven.

items.title: Deterministic audit sampler
items.evidence: scripts/sample-codebase.mjs now honors --max-tokens/--json and samples prioritized live files.

items.title: Cache-backed ops genius-list
items.evidence: ops genius-list now writes and prints .cache/genius-list.json from the latest audit truth path.

items.title: Protocol output assertions
items.evidence: studio protocol smoke now proves sampler and parseable genius-list output, raising studio shard to 39 tests and default suite to 287.

followUps.title: Launch evidence
followUps.evidence: Obtain real football@playfranchisearchitect.com delivery receipt, then rerun launch evidence and live route proof before SPARKED.

blockers.title: SPARKED flip
blockers.evidence: Still blocked on email forwarding/copying receipt and current live-origin/routing evidence.

honestyLedger.title: No fabricated launch readiness
honestyLedger.evidence: SPARKED flip rejected again; code/test health does not prove email delivery.

diffStat.files: 14 tracked files plus 5 new files before generated closeout visuals
diffStat.suite: npm test 287/287; Playwright UI 17/17; Pages build/smoke
